## Analyzers (1)

### Enrich observables with intelligence

#### [OpenCVE v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/OpenCVE)
Enrich a CVE with OpenCVE data: CVSS metrics, CISA KEV status, EPSS score, CWE weaknesses and affected vendors/products.

- **Author:** Ali Bhutto
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `cve`
